✦ r8_go/src/dex/dex_string.go currently houses several major types, including DexString, DexType, DexProto, DexMethod, DexField, and DexItemFactory, which makes the file
  excessively large. I plan to refactor these into separate files to better align with Go's best practices. Additionally, I'll verify if r8_go/src/utils/descriptor.go exists, as
  it's a dependency for the ToSourceString method.

╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮

│                                                                                                                                                                            │
│ Listed 68 item(s).                                                                                                                                                         │

╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ ✓  ReadFile r8_go/src/utils/descriptor_utils.go                                                                                                                            │
│                                                                                                                                                                            │
╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
✦ I've confirmed that utils.DescriptorToJavaType is correctly implemented and used. I'll now refactor r8_go/src/dex/dex_string.go by splitting it into separate files for
  DexString, DexType, DexProto, DexMethod, DexField, and DexItemFactory. I'll begin by extracting DexType into its own file, ensuring that all related methods and dependencies
  are correctly handled within the dex package.

╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ ✓  WriteFile Writing to r8_go/src/dex/dex_type.go                                                                                                                          │
│                                                                                                                                                                            │
│ ... first 105 lines hidden ...                                                                                                                                             │
│ 106 func (t *DexType) IsFloatType() bool {                                                                                                                                 │
│ 107     return len(t.descriptor.Content) > 0 && t.descriptor.Content[0] == 'F'                                                                                             │
│ 108 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 109                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 110 func (t *DexType) IsLongType() bool {                                                                                                                                  │
│ 111     return len(t.descriptor.Content) > 0 && t.descriptor.Content[0] == 'J'                                                                                             │
│ 112 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 113                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 114 func (t *DexType) IsDoubleType() bool {                                                                                                                                │
│ 115     return len(t.descriptor.Content) > 0 && t.descriptor.Content[0] == 'D'                                                                                             │
│ 116 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 117                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 118 func (t *DexType) IsWideType() bool {                                                                                                                                  │
│ 119     return t.IsLongType() || t.IsDoubleType()                                                                                                                          │
│ 120 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 121                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 122 func (t *DexType) GetRequiredRegisters() int {                                                                                                                         │
│ 123     if t.IsVoidType() {                                                                                                                                                │
│ 124         panic("void type does not require registers")                                                                                                                  │
│ 125     }                                                                                                                                                                  │
│ 126     if t.IsWideType() {                                                                                                                                                │
│ 127         return 2                                                                                                                                                       │
│ 128     }                                                                                                                                                                  │
│ 129     return 1                                                                                                                                                           │
│ 130 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 131                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 132 func (t *DexType) IsArrayType() bool {                                                                                                                                 │
│ 133     return len(t.descriptor.Content) > 0 && t.descriptor.Content[0] == '['                                                                                             │
│ 134 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 135                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 136 func (t *DexType) IsClassType() bool {                                                                                                                                 │
│ 137     return len(t.descriptor.Content) > 0 && t.descriptor.Content[0] == 'L'                                                                                             │
│ 138 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 139                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 140 func (t *DexType) IsReferenceType() bool {                                                                                                                             │
│ 141     return t.IsArrayType() || t.IsClassType()                                                                                                                          │
│ 142 }                                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 143                                                                                                                                                                        │
│ 144 func (t *DexType) IsPrimitiveArrayType() bool {                                                                                                                        │
│ 145     if !t.IsArrayType() {                                                                                                                                              │
│ 146         return false                                                                                                                                                   │
│ 147     }                                                                                                                                                                  │
│ 148     d := t.ToDescriptorString()                                                                                                                                        │
│ 149     if len(d) < 2 {                                                                                                                                                    │
│ 150         return false                                                                                                                                                   │
│ 151     }                                                                                                                                                                  │
│ 152     switch d[1] {                                                                                                                                                      │
│ 153     case 'Z', 'B', 'S', 'C', 'I', 'J', 'F', 'D':                                                                                                                       │
│ 154         return true                                                                                                                                                    │
│ 155     default:                                                                                                                                                           │
│ 156         return false                                                                                                                                                   │
│ 157     }                                                                                                                                                                  │
│ 158 }
